requirement_topic.en: Provincial Electrical Code Adoption — Canadian Electrical Code Part I
requirement_topic.zh: 省级电气规范采纳——加拿大电气规范第一部分
requirement_topic.zht: 省級電氣規範採納——加拿大電氣規範第一部分

summary.en: Fixed EV charger installation in Canada is governed by provincial and territorial electrical safety legislation, permits, inspections, and local utility requirements. Provinces and territories commonly adopt CSA C22.1, the Canadian Electrical Code Part I (CEC), with local amendments and edition timing. The CEC contains installation rules for wiring, branch circuits, grounding and bonding, overcurrent protection, disconnecting means, locations, and electric vehicle charging systems. CSA C22.1 is a voluntary model technical code until adopted by a jurisdiction; the mandatory obligation comes from the adopting provincial or territorial Act, regulation, permit, or inspection rule.
summary.zh: 加拿大固定式电动汽车充电设备安装受省和地区电气安全法规、许可、检验及当地公用事业要求管辖。各省和地区通常采纳CSA C22.1《加拿大电气规范第一部分》（CEC），并可能有本地修订及不同版本采纳时间。CEC包含布线、分支电路、接地与等电位连接、过流保护、隔离装置、安装位置和电动汽车充电系统相关安装规则。CSA C22.1在被辖区采纳前是自愿性示范技术规范；强制性义务来自采纳它的省或地区法案、法规、许可或检验规则。
summary.zht: 加拿大固定式電動汽車充電設備安裝受省和地區電氣安全法規、許可、檢驗及當地公用事業要求管轄。各省和地區通常採納CSA C22.1《加拿大電氣規範第一部分》（CEC），並可能有本地修訂及不同版本採納時間。CEC包含佈線、分支電路、接地與等電位連接、過流保護、隔離裝置、安裝位置和電動汽車充電系統相關安裝規則。CSA C22.1在被轄區採納前是自願性示範技術規範；強制性義務來自採納它的省或地區法案、法規、許可或檢驗規則。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety Acts, regulations, permit and inspection rules
CSA C22.1 — Canadian Electrical Code, Part I
Local utility interconnection, load-management, demand, or service-capacity requirements where applicable

summary.en: China installation references may include GB 50966, GB/T 51313, and local grid or construction requirements. These documents are not installation approval for Canada because Canadian projects are inspected under the local Canadian jurisdiction and utility requirements.
summary.zh: 中国安装依据可能包括GB 50966、GB/T 51313以及地方电网或建设要求。这些文件不能作为加拿大安装批准，因为加拿大项目须按照当地加拿大辖区和公用事业要求接受检验。
summary.zht: 中國安裝依據可能包括GB 50966、GB/T 51313以及地方電網或建設要求。這些文件不能作為加拿大安裝批准，因為加拿大項目須按照當地加拿大轄區和公用事業要求接受檢驗。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station
GB/T 51313 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure

gap.en: Product documentation for Canada should provide installation instructions compatible with the applicable CEC edition, local amendments, conductor sizing, breaker or fuse requirements, enclosure/environment ratings, load-management constraints, and inspection expectations. A charger that cannot be installed under local Canadian code and utility conditions may be rejected even if it has product test data.
gap.zh: 加拿大产品文件应提供与适用CEC版本、本地修订、导体尺寸、断路器或熔断器要求、外壳/环境等级、负荷管理限制及检验预期相兼容的安装说明。即使充电设备具有产品测试数据，若无法按照当地加拿大规范和公用事业条件安装，也可能被拒绝。
gap.zht: 加拿大產品文件應提供與適用CEC版本、本地修訂、導體尺寸、斷路器或熔斷器要求、外殼/環境等級、負荷管理限制及檢驗預期相相容的安裝說明。即使充電設備具有產品測試數據，若無法按照當地加拿大規範和公用事業條件安裝，也可能被拒絕。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: comply with the electrical safety Act, regulation, permit, inspection, and utility requirements in the province or territory of installation. CSA C22.1 CEC is a voluntary model code and technical standard until adopted by a jurisdiction; once adopted through law, the adopted code requirements become enforceable through that law.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese installation codes apply to China projects and do not replace Canadian provincial or territorial installation approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Canadian installation acceptance is jurisdiction-specific. The CEC is the key technical code, but enforceability comes from provincial or territorial adoption and inspection rules, not from the CSA standard standing alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加拿大安装验收具有辖区差异。CEC是关键技术规范，但其可执行性来自省或地区采纳及检验规则，而不是CSA标准本身单独产生强制力。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加拿大安裝驗收具有轄區差異。CEC是關鍵技術規範，但其可執行性來自省或地區採納及檢驗規則，而不是CSA標準本身單獨產生強制力。
